justification: All pass criteria met: boundaries correct (10 is heavy, 50 is freight), all 5 ACs covered in tests with explicit AC-to-test mapping in acceptance_criteria_coverage, no external dependencies, no features beyond spec, confidence.level 99 >= 85.

observations.text: Boundary logic correct: weight < 10 for standard, >= 10 && < 50 for heavy, >= 50 for freight
All 5 acceptance criteria explicitly mapped with criterion, test name, and implementation notes
Additional boundary tests (9.99, 49.99, 1000, negative) go beyond minimum requirements
Zero external dependencies, pure function approach
No unrequested features or scope creep
Assumptions documented clearly (1000 kg upper bound inference, generic Error type)
Confidence of 99 is slightly aggressive given the acknowledged assumption about upper bound semantics, though the reasoning is sound
